Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment

Name: Total time spent in SW-Awaiting AE Assignment across all cases

Name: Average time it takes for SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to be followed by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants that end with SW-EIC Reject

Name: Minimum waiting time to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
